## Release — backlog-campaign v0.4.2

### ✨ What's new in v0.4.2

This patch hardens **protocol SSOT documentation**, aligns **harness and install identifiers**, and adds a **rich coordinator dashboard** for campaign visibility.

#### Protocol SSOT & documentation

- **Repository layout** table in README — distinguishes `src/` authoring, build outputs, `.bc-campaign/` protocol SSOT, and ephemeral `.agents/*` handoff dirs
- **Protocol SSOT** section in `bc-campaign-state.md` — enumerates protocol state paths and explicit negations
- **Protocol state boundaries** under Coordinator MUST NOT in `multitask-mode.md`
- SSOT pointer added to `AGENTS.md`

#### Agent model & Cursor spawn

- **Model inheritance** — removes hardcoded `model:` from roster agents; workers inherit the parent session/harness default
- **`V-AGENT-01` / `V-CODEX-04`** — enforce the inheritance contract in verify gates
- **Cursor Task spawn pattern** — coordinator attaches `.cursor/agents/bc-*.md` agent files instead of built-in `subagent_type` enums; mis-spawn hazards documented

#### Maintainer release governance

- **Maintainer release routing** in `bc-coordinator` — routes release requests to create-release skill and `bun run release` CLI
- **Release notes gate** in CI — annotated `vX.Y.Z` tag pushes fail when `.github/releases/${TAG}.md` is missing

#### Install & plugin identifiers

- **Gemini plugin manifest** — `name`, `author`, and `keywords` aligned to `bc-campaign` (parity with Claude/Codex)
- **README Pathway C** — canonical `npx skills add` command with `--skill bc-campaign -y`; global vs project install scope; version pinning limits documented

#### Coordinator dashboard

- **`bun run status`** — CLI alias rendering full campaign dashboard markdown (scope, turn, in-flight/blocked/ready tables, ledger, deferred filings, active workers)
- **Coordinator binding** — full dashboard output required in main chat at campaign start, after orchestrator turns, and on status requests

---

**Full feature overview:** see [v0.1.0 release notes](https://github.com/CorentinLumineau/blackhole/releases/tag/v0.1.0) · [README](https://github.com/CorentinLumineau/blackhole#readme)
